REPLY TO DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE AS UNLIMITED JURISDICTION (TRANSACTION ID # 100059702) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMAN, ERIKA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ERIKA ROMAN'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE AS UNLIMITED JURISDICTION IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 1, 2019. THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO ACCEPT THE EVIDENCE FILED WITH THE REPLY PAPERS, BUT, PER JAY V. MAHAFFEY (2013) 218 CAL.APP.4TH 1522, 1537-38, THE COURT AFFORDS THE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND TO THE NEW EVIDENCE. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE A RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S REPLY BY 5:00 P.M. ON JANUARY 28, 2019. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR EXPEDITED JURY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR RECLASSIFICATION OF CASE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIKA ROMAN's MOTION FOR RECLASSIFICATION OF CASE.

Plaintiff Erika Roman's motion to reclassify case as unlimited jurisdiction is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. The case has conditionally settled per the Notice of Settlement filed January 31, 2019.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684 email: mlendway@sftc.org =(302/RBU)

MOTION FOR RECLASSIFICATION OF CASE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2019 Continued To Feb-01-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIKA ROMAN MOTION FOR RECLASSIFICATION OF CASE

Plaintiff Erika Roman's motion to reclassify case as unlimited jurisdiction is CONTINUED to February 1, 2019. The court exercises its discretion to accept the evidence filed with the reply papers, but, per Jay v. Mahaffey (2013) 218 Cal.App.4th 1522, 1537-38, the court affords the defendant an opportunity to respond to the new evidence. Defendant shall file a response to plaintiff's reply by 5:00 p.m. on January 28, 2019.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
